series_metadata.series_description: Materials relevant to valuation of reserves for Ohio domestic life insurers. Includes annual valuation filing materials (actuarial opinions, memorandum, etc.), reserve data reported through web-site application, and related analysis materials and correspondence. Authority: ORC 3901.77, 3903.72, 3905.40(A)(7); OAC 3901-3-11, 3901-6-10.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: hard copy imaged ; Electronic: hard copy imaged
